## Pages
- [About the Company | HAMER Consulting Group](/about): HAMER Consulting Group is built by former Division I athletes, management consultants, and operators inside leading institutions — to help juniors reach the collegiate level, coaches find the right recruits, and camps run programs that endure.
- [Camps | HAMER Consulting Group](/camps): Operational architecture for golf camps — curriculum design, equipment strategy, and staff training. Trusted by camps across the U.S. and Mexico.
- [Consult | HAMER Consulting Group](/consult): Year-round player development for serious juniors — tournament strategy, practice structure, equipment guidance.
- [Consulting - HAMER](/consulting): Strategic golf consulting.
- [Founders - HAMER](/founders): The architects of Hamer Golf Consulting.
- [Partners | HAMER Consulting Group](/partners): HAMER Consulting Group
- [Privacy Policy | HAMER Golf Consulting](/privacy): No description available
- [Recruit | HAMER Consulting Group](/recruit): End-to-end NCAA placement built on direct Division I experience. From athlete profile to signed offer.
- [Recruiting - HAMER](/recruiting): College golf recruiting and placement.
- [Service Glossary | HAMER Golf Consulting](/glossary): Detailed explanations of the services included in HAMER Golf Consulting packages.
- [Services - Hamer Golf Consulting](/services): Structured guidance programs for junior golfers: college recruiting, tournament strategy, performance development, and family consulting.
- [Terms & Conditions | HAMER Golf Consulting](/terms): No description available
- [The challenge - Hamer Golf Consulting](/thechallenge): Understanding the barriers junior golfers face: cost, access, information gaps, and how Hamer Golf Consulting addresses these challenges.
